title: medicago lupulina f. stipularis
intro: Medicago lupulina f. stipularis, also known as lupine or lupin, is a subspecies of the annual legume Medicago lupulina, characterized by its stipular leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support digestive health and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Medicago lupulina f. stipularis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), improve lactation in nursing mothers, and even support the treatment of cancer. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
